visualizations_description: Detailed view of your health metrics over time.
household_desc: People in your care — open a card to monitor vitals, records, and alerts.
caregiver_home_blurb: Keep an eye on your household — open anyone to check vitals, records, and recent alerts.
doctor_home_blurb: Your caseload at a glance — appointments, alerts, and patients who need follow-up.
doctor_home_focus: Caseload risk, today’s visits, and the next clinical step.
clinic_billing_desc: Set each doctor’s appointment price and track visit debts after completed appointments.
doctor_prices_hint: Each completed appointment for that doctor creates an unpaid debt at this rate.
appointment_debts_hint: Created automatically when a visit is completed with a report.
no_clinic_doctors: No doctors assigned to this clinic yet.
caseload_overview_desc: Live counts across your patients and today’s schedule.
patient_insights_desc: Alert trends, coverage, severity mix, and caseload health.
severity_by_day_desc: How alert severity stacks across the week.
fast_access_desc: Jump to the tools you use every day.
caregiver_home_focus: Who needs you now — unsettled people, recent falls, and meds due.
caseload_risk_desc: High alerts, incomplete records, or no caregiver.
clinical_actions_desc: Open work — not a shortcut wall.
recent_falls_desc: Camera and watch fall signals from your household.
meds_due_desc: Pending doses waiting for a taken / missed response.
household_alerts_desc: Latest signals from people in your care
enter_credentials: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard.
hero_description: Advanced health monitoring and emergency alerts powered by AI. Stay connected, stay safe.
bp_description: Systolic and diastolic readings over time
no_data: No data available for this metric.
error_loading_profile: Unable to load medical record. Please try again later.
manage_medications: Manage your medications and prescriptions here.
manage_medications_reminders: Set the times you take each medication. You will get a reminder alert at those times.
reminder_times_required: Add at least one reminder time
no_adherence_today: No medication doses scheduled yet today.
kpi_description: Key clinical indicators and risk scores at a glance.
patients_list_description: View, monitor and contact your patients.
name: Name
drop_files_here: Drop PDF or clinical files here
import_doctor_only: Patient import is available to doctors only
delete_document_confirm: Delete this document? This removes the file and its indexed chunks.
knowledge_not_indexed_desc: Import and index patient records before running clinical analysis.
analysis_may_take: This may take up to 2 minutes. Please keep this page open.
analysis_failed: Clinical analysis failed. Please try again.
run_first_analysis: Run the first analysis to generate a clinical report.
index_patient_first: Index patient knowledge before generating a report.
feedback_placeholder: Share your clinical assessment of the agent's recommendations...
caregiver_signup_subtitle: Use the referral code from your doctor to create your account.
err_password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
err_password_pattern: Password must be 8–64 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character.
err_username_pattern: Username must start with a letter and use only letters, digits, dots, underscores, or hyphens (3–50 chars).
err_username_same: Caregiver and patient usernames must differ.
err_name_required: First and last name are required
err_relationship_required: Please select your relationship to the patient
fp_subtitle_request: Enter your username or email and we will issue a reset code.
fp_subtitle_confirm: Enter the 6-digit code and choose a new password.
fp_err_password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
fp_err_password_pattern: Password must be 8–64 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a special character.
activity_posture_desc: Latest watch activity and inferred body position
agent_analysis_desc_scheduled: Scheduled clinical-agent review of your knowledge graph and vitals (separate from watch CNN scores).
ai_clinical_assist_desc: Open a patient-scoped AI chat to review meds, vitals, and risk context.
alerts_subdescription: Real-time physiological alerts and predictive clinical indicators powered by SenioSentry AI.
care_check_blurb: A short automatic review of how you’re doing.
causal_graph_desc: Cause → effect relationships grounded in the medical knowledge graph for this run.
cnn_input: 10s PPG/ECG windows @ 125 Hz from the watch, plus age/sex/weight demographics.
cnn_output: Predicted SBP/DBP, AF probability, RMSSD/SDNN, apnea risk, cardiac risk scores.
cnn_results_desc: Edge BiLSTM-CNN estimates from the connected watch stream.
cnn_snapshot_desc: Latest BiLSTM-CNN predicted vitals from the watch stream
compact_charts_desc: Smaller KPI cards and chart heights for phones and narrow screens.
connect_smartwatch_desc: Enter this one-time code on your watch to link it to your account.
manage_smartwatch_desc: Paired watches for your account. Unlink a device to revoke its access.
waiting_for_watch: Waiting for the watch to confirm… this dialog updates automatically.
decision_graph_desc: How the clinical agent walks the observe → interpret → evidence → recommend loop for this analysis.
doctor_alerts_subdescription: Review live clinical alerts across your patients. Filter by patient, severity, and status.
environment_trends_desc: Room temperature, humidity, CO₂ and gas sensor (24h)
failed_load_care_check: Couldn’t load the latest care check.
fall_camera_logs_description: Camera frames captured when a fall was detected. Triage and acknowledge falls from the Alerts panel.
fall_log_note: Acknowledge and triage falls from the Alerts panel — this page is camera logs only.
import_requires_content: Add profile details or upload at least one document before submitting.
import_staff_only: Import Records is available to doctors and caregivers only
med_respond_failed: Could not save response. Try again.
no_alerts_for_patient: No alerts for this patient with the current filters.
no_alerts_found: No physiological alerts found matching filters.
no_care_check_yet: No care check yet. We’ll run one automatically every 8 hours.
no_cnn_windows: No CNN prediction windows yet. Waiting for watch PPG/ECG samples.
no_open_alert_patients: No patients with open alerts right now.
no_profile_desc: Your medical records have not been added yet. Contact your care team to set up your profile.
no_profile_on_file: No structured profile on file yet. Complete the form below to create one.
no_risk_data: No risk assessment data yet. Run an assessment after sufficient wearable data is collected.
no_vitals_for_alert: No wearable vitals available near this alert time.
no_vitals_yet: No vitals yet. Connect your smart watch to start streaming data.
notifications_desc: Manage how you receive alerts and updates
overview_empty_hint: No health data yet. Connect your smart watch from the profile card to populate your daily overview with live vitals.
pairing_pending: Waiting for the watch to confirm pairing. You can request a new code if needed.
pairing_started: Pairing request sent. Check your watch for a code.
past_care_checks_blurb: Earlier automatic reviews — tap one to open.
patient_uuid_pi_hint: Paste this as mqtt.patient_id in senio_pi/config.yaml when linking a Raspberry Pi camera.
pdf_fallback_html: Print was blocked — downloaded HTML instead. Open it and use Print → Save as PDF.
predictive_ai_hero: Live cardiac intelligence from your watch stream — window risk from the edge CNN, with scheduled clinical-agent reviews that surface what matters next.
print_pdf_hint: Use “Save as PDF” in the print dialog
privacy_desc: Control your data and account security
profile_prefilled_hint: Fields below are pre-filled from the patient's existing record. Edit and submit to update indexing.
reports_charts_desc: Customize how dashboard overview KPIs and history charts appear
scheduled_reports_desc: Graph-grounded reports generated every 8 hours by the clinical agent.
search_alerts_placeholder: Search alerts by type, description, activity...
search_doctor_alerts_placeholder: Search by patient, alert type, notes…
settings_subtitle: Manage your application preferences and account security
show_all_charts: Show all overview KPIs on one page (no vitals/environment filter)
show_all_charts_desc: Display wearable and environment cards together on the overview.
show_all_history_charts: Show all history charts at once (no metric filter)
show_all_history_charts_desc: Stack every metric chart on the overview instead of picking one series.
expand_completed_for_reports: Expand a completed visit to view its report.
no_visit_report: No visit report on file for this appointment.
no_completed_visits_yet: Completed visits with reports will appear here once filed.
history_hint: Completed, cancelled, and no-show appointments only — newest first.
video_after_confirm: Online visit link appears after the doctor confirms.
online_visit_step1: Join at the appointment time (or a few minutes early).
online_visit_step2: Click “Open video room”. Allow camera and microphone when the browser asks.
online_visit_step3: Your doctor joins the same room with the same link — no app install needed.
browser_web_push_desc: Receive Critical/High alerts even when the tab is in the background (no SMS required).
web_push_trust_hint: If the padlock says “Not Secure”, download and install the CA first, then reopen this page.
web_push_not_configured: Web Push is not configured on the server yet (VAPID keys). In-app alerts still work.
web_push_needs_https: Open https://…:3000 (not http). Web Push requires a secure page.
web_push_untrusted_cert: TLS is on, but this browser does not trust the certificate (address bar “Not Secure”). Install the SenioSentry CA, reopen the site, then Enable again.
web_push_no_sw: No service worker available. Trust the HTTPS certificate, then try again.
web_push_unsupported: Web Push not supported in this browser
no_assigned_doctor: You have no assigned doctor — ask your clinic to assign one.
calendar_hint: Use Day or Week to see hours on a timeline. Month shows status dots; double-click a day to open Day view.
kanban_hint: Drag cards between columns to update status, or use the quick actions on each card.
visit_report_note_placeholder: Summary, findings, plan… the agent extracts extra changes from this note.
visit_report_note_hint: Required. The agent will also extract additional profile/medication changes from this note.
visit_report_meds_empty: No structured medications. Add them only if you want to upsert specific rows; the agent can also infer meds from the note.
report_required_to_complete: A visit report is required to mark this appointment completed.
recommendations_unavailable_desc: We could not load your recommendations right now. Please try again later.
fall_reports_description: Camera and smartwatch fall detections in one timeline, with device analysis and evidence.
no_fall_events_desc: Camera and watch detections will appear here automatically.
watch_event_no_image: Watch events use motion sensors and do not include a camera image.
watch_fall_analysis: Watch motion sensors detected a fall signature from acceleration and rotation.
camera_fall_analysis: The vision detector classified a person in a floor-level posture.
err_load_clinics: Could not load clinics. Please try again.
app_step_caregiver_desc: Create your caregiver login and contact details.
app_step_patient_desc: Enter the patient profile and create their account credentials.
app_step_clinic_desc: Choose your clinic, then select your doctor and confirm.
select_doctor_desc: Pick the doctor who will care for this patient at the clinic.
err_load_doctors: Could not load doctors. Please try again.
no_doctors_for_clinic: No doctors are available for this clinic yet. Choose another clinic or contact support.
app_submitted_signin_message: Your application was submitted. Sign in with your caregiver account to track status.
apply_subtitle: Create caregiver and patient accounts, choose your clinic and doctor, and submit for review.
app_status_subtitle: Track your clinic application, payment, and approval progress.
app_status_need_signin: Sign in to view your application status.
app_status_none: No application found for this account.
app_payment_verification_body: Your receipt was received. The clinic will verify payment shortly.
app_approved_body: Your application was approved. Open the care dashboard to get started.
applications_desc: Review caregiver applications, request payment, and approve access.
install_app_desc: Install the app to open SenioSentry full-screen — not inside the browser.
install_app_ios_hint: Tap Share, then “Add to Home Screen” to open SenioSentry as its own app.
install_app_android_hint: In Brave/Chrome: menu ⋮ → Install app (or Add to Home screen). Or download the Android app file below.
download_android_app_hint: Install the Android APK for a full-screen app (no browser chrome).
unauthorized: You do not have access to this page.
landing_hero_title: Care that stays with your family — even when you cannot.
landing_hero_body: SenioSentry helps family caregivers apply through their clinic, verify payment, and access a secure care panel for older loved ones.
landing_process_body: A clear path from family application to clinic-approved care access.
landing_step_apply_body: Submit caregiver and patient details and choose your clinic.
landing_step_review_body: Your clinic reviews the application and confirms eligibility.
landing_step_payment_body: Complete payment and upload your receipt for verification.
landing_step_access_body: Once approved, monitor vitals, alerts, and care from one dashboard.
landing_trust_body: SenioSentry connects caregivers, patients, and clinics around safety and clarity.
landing_feat_vitals_body: Stay informed about heart rate, SpO2, and other key signals.
landing_feat_alerts_body: Get notified when something needs attention — not after it is too late.
landing_feat_clinic_body: Applications are reviewed by your clinic so care starts with trust.
landing_feat_ai_body: Use predictive insights and secure chat to coordinate care.
landing_cta_title: Ready to start your clinic application?
landing_cta_body: Apply in a few steps. Your clinic will guide review, payment, and dashboard access.
landing_footer_tag: Smart care for the people you love.
billing_with_plan_desc: Your subscription plan and charges from completed appointments.
appointment_billing_desc: Visit charges linked to your appointments.
no_subscription_plan: No subscription plan on file yet. B2C annual is €780/year (€65/month).
clinic_finance_desc: Appointment pricing and visit debts in euros (€). Set doctor rates and collect unpaid visits.
appointment_debts_hint_eur: Created when a visit is completed. All amounts in euros.
doctor_prices_hint_eur: Each completed appointment creates an unpaid debt at this euro rate.
ai_greeting_sub: How can I help you today?
ai_suggest_meds_action: Could any of my current medications interact with each other?
ai_suggest_symptoms_action: What symptoms should make me seek help for my condition?
ai_suggest_doses_action: Do my current medication doses still look right for me?
ai_suggest_bmi_action: Is my current weight and BMI in a healthy range?
ai_suggest_howami_action: How am I doing overall based on my health records and latest vitals?
ai_suggest_vitals_action: Summarize my latest heart rate, blood pressure, SpO2, and temperature from my wearable data.
ai_suggest_env_action: How are my latest room temperature, humidity, and air-quality readings?
ai_suggest_alerts_action: What recent health alerts or warnings do I have, and what do they mean?
ai_suggest_risk_action: What does my latest health risk assessment say, and what should I watch for?
ai_suggest_ehr_action: Summarize my EHR diagnoses, medical history, and important clinical notes.
